ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Ryugu Robotics K.K. — JP Data Processing and MNPI Handling Notice (APPI/FIEA) for Proposed Share Acquisition
Scope: processing of employee/board data in Project Umikaze regarding the contemplated acquisition of Hinode Materials K.K., an unannounced transaction of a domestic issuer.

Legal basis and purpose: performance of employment duties and corporate governance; APPI provisions on proper acquisition, security control measures, and third-party provision apply; no automated decision-making.

Ms. Keiko Ando (DOB 1988-04-03, age 38), Senior IR Officer at Ryugu Robotics K.K. (Hoshimi-ku, Shin-Tokyo), uses device ID RR-TYO-IR-17, VPN session SakuraVPN-4821, Slack handle @keiko.ando, and mailbox keiko.ando@ryugurobotics.example.jp to receive Q&A
Separately, a warehouse associate in Sapporo aged around 29 using device JP-HKD-WH-03 accessed the HR portal; this demographic data alone is not used to identify any person in this matter
we avoid collecting My Number except where legally required for payroll, and any incidental My Number string is irreversibly hashed and promptly deleted from board files
special care is taken not to ingest resumes or family information into the deal room
we will verify identity without requesting My Number
blackout periods under Kanto Securities Market listing rules

Scope: processing of employee/board data in Project Umikaze regarding the contemplated acquisition of Hinode Materials K.K., an unannounced transaction of a domestic issuer.
PII under APPI includes living-individual information and individual codes; we avoid collecting My Number except where legally required for payroll, and any incidental My Number string is irreversibly hashed and promptly deleted from board files.
For diligence coordination, Ms. Keiko Ando (DOB 1988-04-03, age 38), Senior IR Officer at Ryugu Robotics K.K. (Hoshimi-ku, Shin-Tokyo), uses device ID RR-TYO-IR-17, VPN session SakuraVPN-4821, Slack handle @keiko.ando, and mailbox keiko.ando@ryugurobotics.example.jp to receive Q&A

ideal_must_detect.matched_text:
Scope: processing of employee/board data in Project Umikaze regarding the contemplated acquisition of Hinode Materials K.K., an unannounced transaction of a domestic issuer.
PII under APPI includes living-individual information and individual codes; we avoid collecting My Number except where legally required for payroll, and any incidental My Number string is irreversibly hashed and promptly deleted from board files.
For diligence coordination, Ms. Keiko Ando (DOB 1988-04-03, age 38), Senior IR Officer at Ryugu Robotics K.K. (Hoshimi-ku, Shin-Tokyo), uses device ID RR-TYO-IR-17, VPN session SakuraVPN-4821, Slack handle @keiko.ando, and mailbox keiko.ando@ryugurobotics.example.jp to receive Q&A.
These quasi-identifiers are linked solely to her duty role and are logged in the insider list restricted under FIEA, as the transaction terms and schedule are undisclosed tender-offer facts.
Separately, a warehouse associate in Sapporo aged around 29 using device JP-HKD-WH-03 accessed the HR portal; this demographic data alone is not used to identify any person in this matter.
Categories of processing: board portal access logs, device telemetry, and limited HR contact details; special care is taken not to ingest resumes or family information into the deal room.
Legal basis and purpose: performance of employment duties and corporate governance; APPI provisions on proper acquisition, security control measures, and third-party provision apply; no automated decision-making.
MNPI controls: insider list maintained, file watermarks, and blackout periods under Kanto Securities Market listing rules; disclosure only upon board resolution and coordinated press release.
Cross-border transfer: diligence vendor Shigure Analytics Pte. Ltd. receives pseudonymized datasets via Shin-Tokyo region servers under contracts meeting APPI foreign transfer notice and safeguard requirements; encryption at rest with keys retained in Japan.
Retention: board access logs kept 7 years for audit; MNPI-related mailboxes for Project Umikaze are purged 30 days after public disclosure; any My Number artifacts are purged within 24 hours if misdirected.
Data Subject Requests (shikaku-sha no tetsuzuki): submit access/correction requests by email to privacy@ryugurobotics.example.jp or by post to our Hoshimi-ku office; we will verify identity without requesting My Number.
We will answer within 2 weeks where possible, excluding periods where responding would unlawfully disclose MNPI under FIEA or harm negotiation secrecy.
Security: MFA on all board accounts, device posture checks, and project code name “Umikaze” redacted from external file names; vendor access is session-limited (e.g., session key UMI-SESSION-9H3B).
Contact for whistleblowing on MNPI leakage: ethics@ryugurobotics.example.jp; we will not retaliate against good-faith reports.
Note: generic descriptors such as “male managers in Kansai aged 40
ideal_must_detect.reason: moved from must_detect after strict runtime no longer emitted exact span during Stage B baseline reconciliation
